title: Aaron Raper
extract:
Aaron Raper (born 28 July 1971) is an Australian former rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s.  His position of choice was hooker although he could also fill other spots in the team.  
Raper played in Australia for the Cronulla-Sutherland Sharks and Parramatta Eels and in England for the Castleford Tigers.
